description:
Install or uninstall an SSM Distributor package on an Azure VM using OIDC federation
via a CloudConnector. Fetches the package manifest from SSM, downloads the ZIP,
and runs install/uninstall scripts on the VM via Azure Managed RunCommand.
Supports Linux and Windows VMs.

CloudConnector.description: SSM Cloud Connector ID (UUID format) containing Azure configuration

AzureVmResourceId.description: (Required) The fully qualified Azure Resource Manager path to the target virtual machine. Format: /subscriptions/{subscription-id}/resourceGroups/{resource-group}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/{vm-name}. The VM must be running. Supports both Linux and Windows VMs.

PackageName.description: (Required) The name of the SSM Distributor package to install or uninstall on the Azure VM.

AutomationAssumeRole.description: (Required) The ARN of the IAM role that allows SSM Automation to perform actions on your behalf. The role must trust ssm.amazonaws.com and have permissions to call sts:AssumeRole, sts:GetWebIdentityToken, ssm:GetDocument, and ssm:GetCloudConnector.

Action.description: (Required) Specify whether to install or uninstall the package. Install downloads the package ZIP from SSM Distributor and runs install.sh (Linux) or install.ps1 (Windows) on the VM. Uninstall runs uninstall.sh/ps1 from the currently installed package version. If no version is installed, uninstall returns an error.

InstallationType.description: (Optional) Specify the type of installation. "Uninstall and reinstall": the existing version is fully removed before the new version is installed (runs uninstall script then install script). "In-place update": runs update.sh/ps1 to apply changes without removing the existing installation. If the package does not include an update script, in-place update will fail with an error. Not all packages support in-place update.

Version.description: (Optional) The version of the package to install or uninstall. If you don't specify a version, the system installs the latest published version by default. The system will only attempt to uninstall the version that is currently installed. If no version of the package is installed, the system returns an error. Version format depends on the package (e.g., "1.0", "2.3.1").

AdditionalArguments.description: (Optional) Additional parameters to provide to your install, uninstall, or update scripts. Passed as environment variables to the script execution on the VM. Keys must start with the SSM_ prefix (e.g., {"SSM_MY_PARAM": "value"}). Values are available in the script as $SSM_MY_PARAM (Linux) or $env:SSM_MY_PARAM (Windows).

mainSteps.name: InstallPackage
mainSteps.description: Install or uninstall an SSM Distributor package on an Azure VM via Cloud Connector
